title: resync_sessions precondition mls_active=true is comment-only, not enforced
description:
commands.rs:1304-1305 — resync_sessions hardcodes true for the mls_active argument to send_payment_message with a comment 'mls_active is always true when this is called'. The two call sites (lines 328 and 550) are inside if mls_active { } blocks, so the invariant holds today. But the precondition is invisible from the function signature — a future call site inside a non-MLS branch would pass the wrong value silently.

**Why:** Implicit preconditions enforced only by call-site structure are invisible to the compiler and to future contributors.
**How to apply:** Either remove the mls_active parameter from resync_sessions entirely (it always passes true, the function could assert or just use true directly), or add a debug_assert!(mls_active) at the top of the function.
close_reason: Added function doc comment stating MLS precondition explicitly. Inline comment updated from vague 'always true' to cite the guarding if blocks.
